title: deer-flow.council.profile.fallback_used v1
description: A council persona dispatch fell back from its primary model to the next configured fallback model. Emitted per fallback use so consumers can reconstruct full retry chains by correlating on subject=deliberation_id. Source: /deer-flow/council.

deliberation_id.description: Stable identifier for this deliberation — used as the event subject so multi-level fallback chains are reconstructable

profile_id.description: Active profile name that initiated the dispatch (e.g. skeptic, synthesizer)

persona.description: Persona slot whose primary model failed (e.g. skeptic, analyst)

primary_model.description: Model that just failed or was rate-limited (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6)

fallback_model.description: Model now being attempted as the fallback (e.g. MiniMax-M2.7)

reason.description: Short tag describing why the fallback was triggered (e.g. rate_limited, timeout, 429, context_overflow)
